ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transmission_zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the transmission zone */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the transmission zone */,
  "zone_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission zone */,
  "connection_points" INTEGER /* Number of connection points in the zone */,
  "zone_status" TEXT /* Status of the zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmission_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each period */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the period */,
  "period_type" TEXT /* Type of period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmission_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost record */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transmission zone */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the period */,
  "transmission_cost" REAL /* Cost of transmitting electricity through the zone */,
  "period_discount_factor" REAL /* Discount factor applied to the period */,
  "cost_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission cost */,
  "cost_category" TEXT /* Category of transmission cost */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transmission cost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transmission_costs_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES transmission_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transmission_costs_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES transmission_zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmission_capacities" (
  "capacity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capacity record */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transmission zone */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the period */,
  "new_transmission_capacity_mw" REAL /* New transmission capacity in MW */,
  "fully_deliverable_new_tx_threshold_mw" REAL /* Threshold for fully deliverable new transmission in MW */,
  "fully_deliverable_installed_capacity_mw" REAL /* Installed capacity for fully deliverable transmission in MW */,
  "energy_only_tx_limit_mw" REAL /* Limit for energy-only transmission in MW */,
  "energy_only_installed_capacity_mw" REAL /* Installed capacity for energy-only transmission in MW */,
  "energy_only_limit_dual_$" REAL /* Dual dollar limit for energy-only transmission */,
  "capacity_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission capacity */,
  "reserve_margin" REAL /* Reserve margin for the transmission capacity */,
  "expected_outage_hours" REAL /* Expected outage hours for the transmission capacity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capacity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transmission_capacities_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES transmission_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transmission_capacities_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES transmission_zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transmission zone accessed */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the period accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Type of data accessed */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES transmission_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES transmission_zones ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenario_planning" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transmission zone */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scenario */,
  "cost_impact" REAL /* Estimated cost impact of the scenario */,
  "capacity_impact" REAL /* Estimated capacity impact of the scenario */,
  "scenario_type" TEXT /* Type of scenario planned */,
  "planning_status" TEXT /* Status of the scenario planning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_planning_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES transmission_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_planning_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES transmission_zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_time_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transmission zone */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data */,
  "load_mw" REAL /* Load in MW */,
  "voltage_kv" REAL /* Voltage in kV */,
  "temperature_c" REAL /* Temperature in °C */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the real-time data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the real-time data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_time_data_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES transmission_zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data record */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the data */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the external data */,
  "data_validation" TEXT /* Validation status of the external data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transmission zone */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the period */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES transmission_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES transmission_zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed */,
  "feed_name" TEXT /* Name of the data feed */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data provided by the feed */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data feed */,
  "data_feed_status" TEXT /* Status of the data feed */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of updates for the data feed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmission_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission line */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transmission zone */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the transmission line */,
  "line_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission line */,
  "line_status" TEXT /* Status of the transmission line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transmission_lines_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES transmission_zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "substations" (
  "substation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each substation */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transmission zone */,
  "substation_name" TEXT /* Name of the substation */,
  "substation_type" TEXT /* Type of substation */,
  "substation_status" TEXT /* Status of the substation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("substation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_substations_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES transmission_zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generators" (
  "generator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generator */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transmission zone */,
  "generator_name" TEXT /* Name of the generator */,
  "generator_type" TEXT /* Type of generator */,
  "generator_status" TEXT /* Status of the generator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generators_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES transmission_zones ("zone_id")
)
